name: Chapter Six: Piercing vs. Monsters

attack, severe bleeding
13+

Severity 
Effect
1-5 
No unusual effect

attacks
9-10

11 
Tail severed, victim stunned 1 round, lose tail
attacks, major bleeding; ]A movement, - 4
penalty to attacks if monster uses tail for
movement
12 
Tail severed, stunned 1 round, major bleeding, 'A move and -2 penalty on any attack; if
animal uses tail for movement, no move or
attack
13+
